treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Oxycodone-acetaminophen 5mg/325mg x2, oxycodone 5mg x3, diazepam 5 mg x1, ibuprofen 400mg, Atenolol 50 mg
treatment_information.treatment_response: Took her pain down a notch but made her very drowsy and nauseated

treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Worked with patient to improve mobility
treatment_information.treatment_response: Unable to participate with mobility without max assistance

treatment_timeline.event: Initial vitals checked and treatment with medications administered in the ED
CT pelvis done, showed no fracture

patient_outcome.final_status: Ambulatory - requires assistance or aid (walker or cane)
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Patient was clear and coherent, had someone assist her at home
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient was unable to go home due to pain during admission. Instructed to take OTC pain relief post-discharge.
